THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLORIO, IGNACIO TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SOLORIO, FABIOLA T. NO RECOVERY ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF IGNACIO SOLORIO'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPLICATION TO BE MADE TO JUDGE TSENIN BECAUSE SHE HEARD THE TRIAL. IN ADDITION, THE PARTIES ARE ARGUING OVER THE MEANING OF THE JUDGMENT. PLEASE CALL HER CLERK AT 415-551-0325 TO RE-CALENDAR THIS MOTION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Notice Of Motion Andm Motion To Tax Costs;
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. PLAINTIFF IGNACIO SOLORIO'S Motion To Tax Costs IS Denied without prejudice. Application to be made to Judge Tsenin because she heard the trial. In addition, the parties are arguing over the meaning of the judgment. Please call her clerk at 415-551-0325 to re-calendar this motion.The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
